... / Mafia Getaway Cars

Mafia Getaway Cars

Mafia Getaway Cars is a 2D driving game where you’re driving, escaping, shooting, and occasionally flipping your 1930s mob-mobile over a suspiciously placed slope. If you ever wondered what it’s like to be a vintage gangster on the run with terrible road planning and way too many enemies, this online game is your dream (or nightmare). Put on your best fedora, hop into your sketchy-looking getaway car, and floor it. The cops are mad, the rival gangs are really mad, and gravity?

Play Mafia Getaway Cars Online

Loading game...
About Mafia Getaway Cars

Mafia Getaway Cars is a 2D driving game where you’re driving, escaping, shooting, and occasionally flipping your 1930s mob-mobile over a suspiciously placed slope. If you ever wondered what it’s like to be a vintage gangster on the run with terrible road planning and way too many enemies, this online game is your dream (or nightmare). Put on your best fedora, hop into your sketchy-looking getaway car, and floor it. The cops are mad, the rival gangs are really mad, and gravity? This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Mafia Getaway Cars in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Car game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Mafia Getaway Cars for free?

Yes. Mafia Getaway Cars is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Mafia Getaway Cars?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
